issues.sample: I PURCHASED THIS VEHICLE AT THE END OF MAY 2017, AFTER PUTTING ON ABOUT 500 MI WITHIN 4 WEEKS, A CHECK ENGINE LIGHT CAME ON, I TOOK IT TO THE DEALERSHIP, THEY KEPT IT OVERNIGHT,LOOKED AT IT, AND CALLED THE FOLLOWING DAY & SAID THERE WAS "SOMETHING LOOSE THAT NEEDED TO BE TIGHTENE

THE CARBON CERAMIC BRAKES WERE INCONSISTENT WHEN DRIVING NEW, BUT NOT NOTICEABLE ENOUGH TO IMMEDIATELY GO TO THE DEALER IN THE FIRST ~2000 MILES. THE CAR WAS USED IN TRAFFIC AT A RELATIVELY SLOW SPEED. BUT THEN IT FAILED, AND AS A RESULTANT AN ACCIDENT HAPPENED. THE DEALER IS REF

THE INSTRUMENT CLUSTER PANEL "CRASHED" AND WENT BLACK WHILE THE CAR WAS IN MOTION DURING A DRIVE AT NIGHT. THE LIGHTS AND TURN SIGNALS WERE ALSO NOT WORKING. THIS PROBLEM PERSISTED FOR ABOUT 2 MINUTES AND REOCCURRED 2 OTHER TIMES WITHIN A DISTANCE OF 3 MILES OF OPERATION. TAKEN T

narrative.headline: What 2017 Alfa Romeo Giulia owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 65 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (42% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: I PURCHASED THIS VEHICLE AT THE END OF MAY 2017, AFTER PUTTING ON ABOUT 500 MI WITHIN 4 WEEKS, A CHECK ENGINE LIGHT CAME ON, I TOOK IT TO THE DEALERSHIP, THEY KEPT IT OVERNIGHT,LOOKED AT IT, AND CALLED THE FOLLOWING DAY & SAID THERE WAS "SOMETHING LOOSE THAT NEEDED TO BE TIGHTENE
